summary: First iteration end-to-end test of QuickFix marketplace (backend + frontend). Backend: 31/31 pytest cases passed covering auth (register/login/logout/me/refresh cookies, invalid creds, blocked-user lockout), services CRUD + list filters, provider stats, booking full lifecycle (create -> confirm -> complete -> review + rating recalc), review duplicate/completed-only guard, customer cancel, profile update, admin stats/users/block-unblock/bookings, soft-delete services. Frontend: Landing (10 category cards, no broken images), Services page (search, category filter via radix, city filter, service card grid), Service Detail, Unauthenticated Book Now correctly redirects to /login, Customer login->dashboard, Booking modal creates booking (verified pending badge visible), Profile save, Theme toggle, Logout, Admin login->admin dashboard, Provider login->provider dashboard, Mobile menu on 390x844. Invalid login stays on /login (verified). All major flows in the review request pass.
critical_code_review_comments: CORS: allow_origins is built from FRONTEND_URL env var only (plus localhost). Ensure FRONTEND_URL stays in sync with the deployed preview URL; if it drifts, credentials-based CORS breaks silently. Consider allowing a regex for *.preview.emergentagent.com.
auth.py `/refresh` regenerates BOTH access and refresh tokens on every call (refresh rotation) but does not blacklist old refresh token. Low risk given short expiry, but noteworthy.
reviews.recalculate_rating passes provider_id string to users collection lookup via ObjectId(entity_id) - works because provider_id is stored as string of ObjectId, ok.
seed_data image_url_external fallback is intentional per spec, confirmed images load on Services page.

Radix Select components (services-category-filter, booking time, service form category) are buttons not native selects. Testing agents must click trigger then role=option; this is a testing detail, not a bug.
No file-size check missing anywhere critical; MAX_IMAGE_SIZE 5MB enforced.
Consider adding `/api/auth/me` returning 200 with null when unauthenticated to avoid noisy 401s on initial page load (currently returns 401 which is logged as an error in console). Minor UX nit.
seed_data_creation: Test suite creates TEST_-prefixed users and services via API; cleans up admin block-unblock user via delete. Persistent TEST_Service_* created (soft-deleted at end).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py is comprehensive (31 tests) and can be re-run with `REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=<url> pytest backend/tests/backend_test.py`. It uses session-scoped fixtures for admin/provider/customer login. Radix Select components require click+role=option selectors, not select_option. The customer-dashboard-status-filter, admin-role-filter, and service-form-category-select are all radix triggers.
